description: This pipeline reads in a folder, selects specific files based on certain criteria, and saves the selected files to another folder. The main steps include reading the folder, selecting files based on criteria, and saving the selected files.

e9d3ca18-a8a2-47f9-8db6-2c0bb1cd2828.name: ij1-contrast-illumination-correction2d
e9d3ca18-a8a2-47f9-8db6-2c0bb1cd2828.description: Applies a Gaussian filter to the image and extracts the maximum value. Pixel values are then divided by this value.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

42cdf326-2860-4f73-9156-1b0a06116e05.description: Implementation of the ImageJ contrast enhancer feature that uses histograms and normalization methods.

00164599-6a77-40d5-995c-f6444505d835.name: clij:plugin:net.haesleinhuepf.clij2.plugins.ExtendedDepthOfFocusSobelProjection
00164599-6a77-40d5-995c-f6444505d835.description:
Extended depth of focus projection maximizing intensity in the local sobel image.

The sigma parameter allows controlling an Gaussian blur which should smooth the altitude map.

Parameters: Image source, ByRef Image destination, Number sigma
Available for: 3D -> 2D
